description: Hierarchical concept taxonomy for LinguaGraph, derived bottom-up from trilingual corpus co-occurrence analysis and expert review.
method: LOGOS-inspired: extraction → co-occurrence clustering → schema induction

description.zh: 与政治体制、法律和治理结构相关的概念
description.de: Konzepte zu politischen Systemen, Gesetzen und Regierungsstrukturen
description.en: Concepts related to political systems, laws, and governance structures

description.zh: 与个人自主、自由意志和自我决定相关的概念
description.de: Konzepte zu Autonomie, Willensfreiheit und Selbstbestimmung
description.en: Concepts related to personal autonomy, free will, and self-determination

description.zh: 与社会公平、正义和集体责任相关的概念
description.de: Konzepte zu Gerechtigkeit, Gleichheit und kollektiver Verantwortung
description.en: Concepts related to justice, equality, and collective responsibility

description.zh: 与宗教、哲学、历史和身份认同相关的概念
description.de: Konzepte zu Religion, Philosophie, Geschichte und Identität
description.en: Concepts related to religion, philosophy, history, and identity

description.zh: 与经济活动、进步和物质成功相关的概念
description.de: Konzepte zu Wirtschaft, Fortschritt und materiellem Erfolg
description.en: Concepts related to economic activity, progress, and material success

metadata.generation_method: co-occurrence clustering on trilingual Wikipedia + education corpus
